summary_en: Year-end dividend for FY3/26 increased to 31 yen per share (62 yen pre-split) from prior forecast of 27 yen per share (54 yen pre-split), representing an 8 yen increase on a pre-split basis. Full-year dividend: 112 yen per share (pre-split equivalent) from prior forecast of 104 yen per share. Prior year (FY3/25): 100 yen per share annual.
title_en: Notice of Revision to Dividend Forecast (Increase) for Fiscal Year Ending March 2026
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, TPR Co., Ltd. (TSE Prime: 6463) announced an upward revision to its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2026. The company increased the year-end dividend guidance from 27 yen per share (54 yen on a pre-split basis) to 31 yen per share (62 yen pre-split), a gain of 8 yen in pre-split terms. The full-year dividend for FY3/26 is now projected at 112 yen per share (pre-split equivalent), up from the prior forecast of 104 yen per share. The revision reflects stronger-than-expected consolidated results for the current full year. The company follows a dividend policy that balances periodic earnings, ongoing investment needs, and shareholder return expectations. For context, the prior fiscal year (FY3/25) dividend was 100 yen per share annually. Note: TPR executed a 1-for-2 stock split effective 1 October 2025, and all figures are presented in both post-split and pre-split equivalent bases.
